content: I checked both PRs directly. `#273` is still the stale `run/apple/Grace` branch and remains dirty, but the replacement structural-only PR `#275` on `run/apple/Grace-structural-refresh` is open and clean against `run/apple/main`: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/275. That is the refreshed branch with the narrowed structural mutation diff you asked for. Please review #275 instead of #273.
